headline: Cencora Appoints Eva Boratto as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., May 27, 2026--Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) today announced Eva C. Boratto has been appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the Company, effective June 29, 2026. Ms. Boratto succeeds James F. Cleary, who will be retiring from his role as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer as previously announced. Mr. Cleary will serve in an advisory capacity through the end of 2026 to help ensure a smooth transition.
